name: part_013
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-pro-preview/part_013.webm

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco on stage giving her closing remarks for her birthday live, announcing a new song and membership content.
Ending credits rolling with background music.

subtitles.original: はーい、ということで、
subtitles.english: Okaaaaay, so...

subtitles.original: みんな、どうだったかなー？
subtitles.english: how was it, everyone?

subtitles.original: 今回の新曲、『キミの秒針』は...
subtitles.english: For this new song, "Kimi no Byoushin"...

subtitles.original: シドのマオ様が作詞、
subtitles.english: Mao-sama from SID wrote the lyrics,

subtitles.original: そして御恵明希様が作曲、編曲...
subtitles.english: and Aki Mimegumi-sama composed and arranged it...

subtitles.original: そして編曲にはなんと！
subtitles.english: And for the arrangement, believe it or not!

subtitles.original: 加藤貴之様も加わっていただきましたー！
subtitles.english: Takayuki Kato-sama also joined in!

subtitles.original: いや今回は、ボイスドラマ連動企画の...
subtitles.english: Well, this time, as part of a voice drama tie-in project...

subtitles.original: 第一弾として、
subtitles.english: as the first installment,

subtitles.original: ストーリー全体のね、テーマソングを担うような、
subtitles.english: it serves as the theme song for the entire story,

subtitles.original: 渾身の楽曲に仕上がっております。
subtitles.english: and has been finished as a true masterpiece.

subtitles.original: ま、ドラマの鍵となるね、『秒針』という...
subtitles.english: Also, the "second hand" is key to the drama,

subtitles.original: メタファーにも要注目してください！
subtitles.english: so please pay close attention to that metaphor!

subtitles.original: シドさんだけではなく、
subtitles.english: Not only SID-san,

subtitles.original: このあとね、豪華アーティストの皆様にも...
subtitles.english: but afterwards, many gorgeous artists...

subtitles.original: たくさん書いていただいたので！
subtitles.english: wrote many songs for me, so...

subtitles.original: 皆様リリース、お楽しみにー！
subtitles.english: everyone, please look forward to the release!

subtitles.original: こちらの『キミの秒針』は、
subtitles.english: As for this "Kimi no Byoushin",

subtitles.original: 各音楽サイトは...
subtitles.english: on various music sites...

subtitles.original: ちょっと間が空いちゃうんだけど、
subtitles.english: there's a bit of a gap, but,

subtitles.original: 3月15日の0時から、配信予定でございまーす！
subtitles.english: it's scheduled for distribution starting March 15th at midnight!

subtitles.original: ま、ちょっとね、公開まで時間が空くから...
subtitles.english: Well, since there's some time until it's public...

subtitles.original: それまでこの配信、何度も見返してみてください！
subtitles.english: until then, please watch this stream over and over!

subtitles.original: 聴き込んでねー！
subtitles.english: Listen to it a lot, okay?!

subtitles.original: そしてそして！
subtitles.english: And, and!

subtitles.original: MVもね、ちょっと後日公開なので...
subtitles.english: the MV will also be released at a later date, so...

subtitles.original: 楽しみに待っててくださーい！
subtitles.english: please wait forward to it!

subtitles.original: ということで！
subtitles.english: So!

subtitles.original: 今日のちょこの、生誕ライブはどうだったかなー？
subtitles.english: how was today's Choco's birthday live?

subtitles.original: ま、このあとは、すぐに...
subtitles.english: Well, right after this...

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、冒頭...
subtitles.english: a little bit, the beginning...

subtitles.original: 最初の方でお披露目した...
subtitles.english: that we unveiled at the start...

subtitles.original: ノエちゃんと、ラミたんとの、3人の...
subtitles.english: with Noe-chan and Lamy-tan, the three of us...

subtitles.original: 『初恋大戦争』の、MV公開があって...
subtitles.english: there's the MV release for "First Love Great War"...

subtitles.original: そのあと！
subtitles.english: After that!

subtitles.original: メン限で！
subtitles.english: In the membership-only stream!

subtitles.original: ちょっと、ライブと...
subtitles.english: a little live, and...

subtitles.original: 撮影会の続きとか、
subtitles.english: the continuation of the photo session,

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、メン限でしか見れない...
subtitles.english: and, well, things you can only see in membership...

subtitles.original: シチュエーションドラマとかやるので！
subtitles.english: like situation dramas!

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ、気になる人は見に来てくださーい！
subtitles.english: By all means, if you're interested, please come watch!

subtitles.original: それでは、またあとでお会いしましょう！
subtitles.english: Alright then, let's meet again later!

subtitles.original: おつかれいと～！はむっ！
subtitles.english: Otsukareito~! *mwah*!
